## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Ramp and GrowthX to discuss content updates, project priorities, and workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/LXRqVWByk_t1t-vg5fd6JKxtSYGushLT?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content publication is behind schedule: 29 articles live, 10 drafts in Webflow, 26 recently reviewed](https://fathom.video/share/LXRqVWByk_t1t-vg5fd6JKxtSYGushLT?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Focus shifted to prioritize specific projects over general workflow](https://fathom.video/share/LXRqVWByk_t1t-vg5fd6JKxtSYGushLT?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Per diem articles need refinement; New York article closest to desired quality](https://fathom.video/share/LXRqVWByk_t1t-vg5fd6JKxtSYGushLT?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [2-3 weeks estimated for workflow calibration and content improvement](https://fathom.video/share/LXRqVWByk_t1t-vg5fd6JKxtSYGushLT?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)

## Topics

### Content Status and Publication Backlog

  - [29 articles currently published](https://fathom.video/share/LXRqVWByk_t1t-vg5fd6JKxtSYGushLT?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [10 drafts saved in Webflow, awaiting review and publication](https://fathom.video/share/LXRqVWByk_t1t-vg5fd6JKxtSYGushLT?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [26 articles recently reviewed, separate from the 10 drafts](https://fathom.video/share/LXRqVWByk_t1t-vg5fd6JKxtSYGushLT?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Team agreed to pause general workflow to focus on flagged projects](https://fathom.video/share/LXRqVWByk_t1t-vg5fd6JKxtSYGushLT?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Aim to publish backlogged content gradually to avoid releasing 50 articles simultaneously](https://fathom.video/share/LXRqVWByk_t1t-vg5fd6JKxtSYGushLT?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)

### Per Diem Articles and Quality Improvements

  - [5 per diem articles and 5 best credit card articles produced](https://fathom.video/share/LXRqVWByk_t1t-vg5fd6JKxtSYGushLT?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [New York article closest to desired quality (edited by Bisera)](https://fathom.video/share/LXRqVWByk_t1t-vg5fd6JKxtSYGushLT?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Main issues: tone of voice, use of second person, content flow, and repetitiveness](https://fathom.video/share/LXRqVWByk_t1t-vg5fd6JKxtSYGushLT?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [AI struggling with distinguishing between employee and employer perspectives](https://fathom.video/share/LXRqVWByk_t1t-vg5fd6JKxtSYGushLT?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Plan to bring writers on board to improve content quality](https://fathom.video/share/LXRqVWByk_t1t-vg5fd6JKxtSYGushLT?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)

### Voice and Tone Guidelines

  - [Ali to send additional voice and tone guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/LXRqVWByk_t1t-vg5fd6JKxtSYGushLT?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Need to incorporate Ramp's specific language preferences (e.g., using "Writer" tool)](https://fathom.video/share/LXRqVWByk_t1t-vg5fd6JKxtSYGushLT?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Aim for concise and straightforward language](https://fathom.video/share/LXRqVWByk_t1t-vg5fd6JKxtSYGushLT?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [New workflows being built to incorporate Ramp's guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/LXRqVWByk_t1t-vg5fd6JKxtSYGushLT?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)

### Editorial Process and Publishing Strategy

  - [Heavy editorial passes still required](https://fathom.video/share/LXRqVWByk_t1t-vg5fd6JKxtSYGushLT?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Suggestion to publish articles and then refine them post-publication](https://fathom.video/share/LXRqVWByk_t1t-vg5fd6JKxtSYGushLT?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [1-2 week window for updates after going live, before significant traffic](https://fathom.video/share/LXRqVWByk_t1t-vg5fd6JKxtSYGushLT?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)

### Project Timelines and Scaling

  - [CTO working on workflow improvements (est. 2 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/LXRqVWByk_t1t-vg5fd6JKxtSYGushLT?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [Content team calibration (est. 1 week)](https://fathom.video/share/LXRqVWByk_t1t-vg5fd6JKxtSYGushLT?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
  - [Total estimate: 2-3 weeks for workflow calibration and content improvement](https://fathom.video/share/LXRqVWByk_t1t-vg5fd6JKxtSYGushLT?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [Plan to revisit vendor and template projects in second week of November](https://fathom.video/share/LXRqVWByk_t1t-vg5fd6JKxtSYGushLT?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)

### Data Scraping Collaboration
